title: salvia blancoana subsp. hegelmaieri
intro: Salvia blancoana subsp. hegelmaieri, also known as Blue Sage, is a subspecies of the Salvia blancoana plant, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to calm the nervous system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of Salvia blancoana subsp. hegelmaieri include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to support digestive health and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Blue Sage can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
